final_files.tests/test_runtime_final.py:
import pytest

from task_runtime import run_task


def test_process_exit_survives_failed_teardown_and_all_hooks_run():
    events = []

    def task(teardowns):
        teardowns.callback(lambda: events.append("first"))

        def broken_teardown():
            events.append("broken")
            raise RuntimeError("teardown failed")

        teardowns.callback(broken_teardown)
        teardowns.callback(lambda: events.append("last"))
        raise SystemExit("worker shutdown")

    with pytest.raises(SystemExit, match="worker shutdown"):
        run_task(task)

    assert events == ["last", "broken", "first"]
